en.eNote: No meals logged for Jul 7 – Jul 13 (last intake log: Jun 14), so the energy and burn charts assume the 2,000 kcal plan. Garmin active burn averaged ~415 kcal/day, peaking 665 on Wednesday's pool intervals and 624 on Thursday's squat + swim. Friday (Jul 10) was a rest day (32 kcal); Monday (Jul 13) is just starting — an easy pool swim is planned.
en.bNote: Net exercise = Garmin active calories; standing BMR 2,414. Intake assumes 2,000 kcal all seven days (none logged after Jun 14), so the implied balance ≈ −829 kcal/day is exercise-driven, not measured. Monday (Jul 13) just starting.
en.wNote: Bridge shows the last logged meals (Jun 12–14) — no intake was logged for the displayed week. Negative balance = deficit.
en.i1t: Wednesday's pool set was the week's hardest swim
en.i1: Wednesday's 2.2 km pool session (10×100 / 10×50, avg HR 127, max 153, 65 min) drove 769 active kcal — the biggest single-session burn of the week and the clear intensity peak among three swims.
en.i2: Aerobic work came from three swims — Wednesday's harder 2.2 km intervals (avg HR 127), Thursday's short 0.8 km swim (avg HR 111) alongside the squat, and Sunday's easy 1.0 km (avg HR 121). One quality set plus easy volume.
en.i3: This morning RHR eased to 53 and HRV jumped to 45 (+8 vs the previous night, above the 39 average). Last night was a full 8h00 at score 87 — deep 1h13, only 9m awake — following Sunday's easy 1 km swim. The best recovery marker in the window.
en.i4t: Strength: three lifts, hack squat leads tonnage
en.i4: Three strength sessions this window: Tuesday's hack squat 13,986 kg (188 reps, the only Hevy-logged lift), Thursday's squat (Garmin 59 min, avg HR 108) and Saturday's trap-bar deadlift (Garmin 49 min, avg HR 119, max 149). The trap-bar hasn't synced to Hevy yet, so its tonnage and set-peaks will fill on the next refresh.
en.rec: Monday opens with a pool swim (easy technique / aerobic). The week behind: 6 sessions across 5 active days (5h10, ~3,074 active kcal) — three strength sessions (hack squat 13,986 kg Tuesday, a squat Thursday, and Saturday's trap-bar deadlift) plus three pool swims (a 2.2 km interval set, a short technique swim, and Sunday's easy 1 km). Only Friday was a full rest day. Recovery is strong: RHR 53 and HRV 45 (above baseline) off a full 8h00 at score 87. A good platform to start the week. Next: swim today, hack squat Tuesday, swim intervals Wednesday.
en.foot: Data: 2026-07-07 → 2026-07-13 · Garmin fenix 8 + Hevy + Intervals.icu via Freddy
en.foot2: plan: Mon swim · Tue hack squat · Wed swim intervals · Thu squat · Fri rest · Sat trap-bar DL · Sun rest/hike/bike

hr.eNote: Nema zabilježenih obroka za 7.7. – 13.7. (zadnji unos: 14.6.), pa grafovi energije i potrošnje pretpostavljaju planskih 2.000 kcal. Garmin aktivna potrošnja prosj. ~415 kcal/dan, vrhunac 665 na srijedinim bazenskim intervalima i 624 na četvrtkovom čučnju + plivanju. Petak (10.7.) bio je dan odmora (32 kcal); ponedjeljak (13.7.) tek počinje — planirano lagano plivanje u bazenu.
hr.bNote: Neto trening = Garmin aktivne kalorije; standardni BMR 2.414. Unos pretpostavlja 2.000 kcal svih sedam dana (ništa zabilježeno nakon 14.6.), pa je implicirana bilanca ≈ −829 kcal/dan posljedica treninga, ne mjerena. Ponedjeljak (13.7.) tek počinje.
hr.wNote: Most prikazuje zadnje zabilježene obroke (12.–14.6.) — za prikazani tjedan nema unosa. Negativna bilanca = deficit.
hr.i1t: Srijedin bazenski set bio je najteže plivanje tjedna
hr.i1: Srijedino plivanje 2,2 km u bazenu (10×100 / 10×50, prosj. puls 127, maks 153, 65 min) donijelo je 769 aktivnih kcal — najveća potrošnja pojedinačnog treninga u tjednu i jasan vrhunac intenziteta među tri plivanja.
hr.i2: Aerobni rad došao je iz tri plivanja — srijedinih težih intervala 2,2 km (prosj. puls 127), četvrtkovog kratkog plivanja 0,8 km (prosj. puls 111) uz čučanj, i nedjeljnog laganog 1,0 km (prosj. puls 121). Jedan kvalitetan set plus lagana volumena.
hr.i3t: Oporavak: autonomika se vratila, san snažan
hr.i3: Jutros je RHR pao na 53, a HRV skočio na 45 (+8 vs prethodna noć, iznad prosjeka od 39). Sinoć punih 8h00 uz ocjenu 87 — duboki san 1h13, samo 9m budnosti — nakon nedjeljnog laganog plivanja 1 km. Najbolji marker oporavka u razdoblju.
hr.i4t: Snaga: tri dizanja, hack squat vodi u tonaži
hr.i4: Tri treninga snage ovog razdoblja: utorkov hack squat 13.986 kg (188 ponavljanja, jedino dizanje u Hevyju), četvrtkov čučanj (Garmin 59 min, prosj. puls 108) i subotnje trap-bar mrtvo dizanje (Garmin 49 min, prosj. puls 119, maks 149). Trap-bar još nije sinkroniziran s Hevyjem, pa će mu se tonaža i vrhovi serija popuniti pri sljedećem osvježavanju.
hr.rec: Ponedjeljak počinje plivanjem u bazenu (lagana tehnika / aerobno). Tjedan iza: 6 treninga kroz 5 aktivnih dana (5h10, ~3.074 aktivnih kcal) — tri treninga snage (hack squat 13.986 kg u utorak, čučanj u četvrtak i subotnje trap-bar mrtvo dizanje) plus tri bazenska plivanja (intervalni set 2,2 km, kratko tehničko plivanje i nedjeljnih laganih 1 km). Samo je petak bio potpuni dan odmora. Oporavak je snažan: RHR 53 i HRV 45 (iznad osnovice) nakon punih 8h00 uz ocjenu 87. Dobra osnova za početak tjedna. Sljedeće: plivanje danas, hack squat u utorak, intervali u srijedu.
hr.foot: Podaci: 7.7. → 13.7.2026. · Garmin fenix 8 + Hevy + Intervals.icu putem Freddyja
